TcHmi.Controls.System.TcHmiFlexContainer.title: FlexLayout
TcHmi.Controls.System.TcHmiFlexContainer.description: Defines the layout of the flex container.

propertiesMeta.name: flexDirection
flexWrap
propertiesMeta.description:
Defines the wrapping behavior of the flex container. 
With NoWrap, items are laid out in a single line which may cause overflow. 
With Wrap, items will wrap onto multiple lines, from top to bottom.

propertiesMeta.name: justifyContent
propertiesMeta.description:
Defines the alignment along the main axis. 
With Flex-Start, items are packed toward the start of the flex-direction. 
With Flex-End, items are packed toward the end of the flex-direction. 
With Center, items are centered along the line. 
With Space-Between, items are evenly distributed in the line; first item is on the start line, last item on the end line. 
With Space-Around, items are evenly distributed in the line with equal space around them. 
With Space-Evenly, items are distributed so that the spacing between any two items (and the space to the edges) is equal.

propertiesMeta.name: alignItems
propertiesMeta.description:
Defines the alignment of items along the cross axis. 
With Flex-Start, items are aligned toward the start of the cross-axis. 
With Flex-End, items are aligned toward the end of the cross-axis. 
With Center, items are centered along the cross-axis. 
With Baseline, items are aligned such as their baselines align.

propertiesMeta.name: alignContent
propertiesMeta.description:
Defines the alignment of items along the cross axis when wrapping is active. 
With Flex-Start, lines are packed toward the start of the cross-axis. 
With Flex-End, lines are packed toward the end of the cross-axis. 
With Center, lines are centered along the cross-axis. 
With Space-Between, lines are evenly distributed in the cross-axis; first line is on the start line, last line on the end line. 
With Space-Around, lines are evenly distributed in the cross-axis with equal space around them.

propertiesMeta.name: columnGap
propertiesMeta.description: Defines the gap between columns in the flex container. Can be a pixel value (42px), percent value (42%).

propertiesMeta.name: rowGap
propertiesMeta.description: Defines the gap between rows in the flex container. Can be a pixel value (42px), percent value (42%).

propertiesMeta.name: overflowX
propertiesMeta.description: Defines the overflow behavior of the flex container along the horizontal axis.

propertiesMeta.name: overflowY
propertiesMeta.description: Defines the overflow behavior of the flex container along the vertical axis.

TcHmi.Controls.System.TcHmiFlexContainer.description: Defines the direction of the items in the flex container.
Defines the wrapping behavior of the flex container.
Defines how items are aligned along the main axis of the flex container.
Defines the alignment of items along the cross axis.
Defines the alignment of items along the cross axis when wrapping is active.
